TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == H2 " manga a nikulitan" H2 == "H2" ci An-ta-cun kina misangaay tina nu Dipun a mangaan. ina ka kungkuan u Kaw-cung nu miyakiway ku sasasulitan, itida tu i tusaay nu tatami atu tataynaan, nina sepatay a tademawan itida i sakasungaay atu nikasasumidangan a nikatahekalan nu kakungkuan. "H2" a daymukan nu kakungkuan tu ninatatusaay a tatamaan nu sakasinganganan. ci Kuo-cin-pi-li nu ngangan, nu Dipun a sasakamuen "HIRO" nu igu a kamuan "HERO", i Cin-cun kawcung piyakiwan u wanpay miwaitay. duma a tatamaan han ci Ciaw-ing-sun "HIDEO", i Min-he-yi piyakiwan u samatinengay misetulay. nina tusaay a micudaday caay kaw malecaday ku nipicudad i kawcung, caay kalecad ku pimalian, mangalay a micumud i Ciaw-ce-yen sisa masasetset sa. "H2" ."H2" "HIRO"śėĮŚŹĖŤčĪŤ™ě"HERO"ÁöĄŤęßťü≥, (HIDEO), . ina tatusaay a cabayan sa caay kalecad ku nipikawcungan, nu nikapicudadan ni Kuo-cin-pi-li tu kawcung patelac ku nipimelaw nu misaydan tu imelang nida, sisa ci Kuo-cin-pi-li acaay tu kaku piyakiw sa, sisa mipili' ci nida tu nayi'ay nu miyakiway a cacudadan nu kawcung, nikatinengan satu tu nikapatelac nu misaydan, itida satu patideng tu manamuhay nu micudaday a tademaw tu piyakiwan nu masakaputay, malasakakaay nu miwaitay tu malian. sisa " H2" inaimi han " tusaay ingsyung" . musakamu tu i yayakiwan nu nikasasetsetan, i hekal han u masasungaayay ku nu heni a tatusa. ina ka kungkuan nu hedek u sakapahay a melawan itini i Ciaw-ce-yen a nikasasetsetan nu malian. .śČÄšĽ•"H2" . Kuo-cin-pi-li ŚúčŤ¶čśĮĒŚĎā Pilecuhan: cacay bulad sabaw enem demiad. Cin-cun cacudadan nu piyakiwan wanpay miwaitay, naw Cin-na cungsye nu wanpay miwaitay, nipatelacan nu misaydang, sisa pili' satu ci nida tu inai'ay nu yakiwan a picudadan. likeluh saca tu ci Ku-he-cun-haw atu misaydang tu mapaadih satu, atu ci Ye-ten-dun paytem sa patideng tu Cin-cun cacudadan tu piyakiwan nu likisian, sakatulu ku pibataan nida, sakapahay nida a mibata', idaw ku "hidawhaw anta cewan" nu pinganganan. ci Pi-ci insiyung ku matinengay ci Yi-kun-ya-lin, misuayaw ci Yi-kun-ya-li acu Ku-he-cun-haw idaw ku ngalay, misuayaw tina tusaay a ngalay nai' ku watan. ÁĒüśó•:1śúą16śó•. . Ci-in-siung ś©ėŤčĪťõĄ pailecuhan: sabaw cacay bulad enem demiad. matinengay nu misetulay tu yakiaw a tademaw ci Min-he-yi-kaw, hina i balucu'en nida ku ci lian tu caycin anta tu nikakapahan. micudad henay i Cin-na-cun-sye sikayan ni Kuo-cin-pi-li tu ci Yi-kun-ya-lin. luma' ni Ci-in-siung u tataydaan nina sapatay a tademaw ci Pi-li,Ten-ye, Ya-lin kalecapuan, u aadihan ni Pi,Ya-ten tu cudadan. ÁĒüśó•:11śúą6śó•. . Ye-kun-ya-lin ťõ®ŚģģťõÖÁé≤ pilecuhan: walu bulad sabaw enem demiad. sakapahay nu biyawan a cabayan ci Pi-li, nika kaadihan ni Pi-li ku nisacabayan, sipasiwkay han ci Ci-ing-siung, malamamidang tu ni In-syung, nika ida i balucu ku ngalay ci Pi-lian idaw henay ku ngalay ci Pi-lian. 41 pilecuhan: tulu bulad tulu demiad. sakapahay ni Pi-li micudad i kawcung, manamuh ci Pi-lian. kakahan u Cin-cun cacudadan nu miyakiway a ciawlien. ci Pi-li itida i kuse ni ama nida mikuli, kalaapaapaan ku wayway, kilul han kina ka kungkuan u masatatungusay nu tataynaan, manamuh ci Pi-lian. ÁĒüśó•:3śúą3śó•. . Ye-ten-tun ťáéÁĒįśē¶ atu ci Kuo-cin sakakapahay a maaedaw nu midakepay tu malaian, i piyakiwan nu " acawa" ni Pi-li, sakalecad ni Pi-li kapatelacan nu misaydan ci nida sisa tayda i nai'ay nu miyakiway a cacudadan i Cin-cun-kaw-siaw. ci Ciaw-cen caay kaw kalawkaway nika kahemekan ku icelang, piyakiwan u sakasepat nu mibataay, caay ka lawlaw ku balucu, nika i katuuday matineng pakatawa tu katuuday. . Mu-ken-lung-tay-lang śú®ś†ĻťĺćŚ§™ťÉé Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu mitukuday atu miyakiway tu mali a kaputan, yu micudad tu nu wawaan milabu tu Pay-san-ten-se kaput sa atu Ci-ing-siung maalaw tu sapibataan mademec inai' ku nabalucuan, itini satu pikuocungan milabu tu mitukuday malamitukuday nu hinaalaay tu tinsuan, hinaalaala ku balucu'. micudad satu tu kawcung maala nu picudadan nu Sin-sin piyakiwan milihida milabu, mala sakay hekal nu midakepay tu malian atu sakacacay nu mibata'ay, malecad mala sakatusa nu miwaitay tu malian, u mamuculil tu tulu a nipitepatepaan nu kapahay a kaputan. Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway, wawa nu Cin-cun-kaw-siaw a sasaydan, matineng mikulit. naw mapatay nu linges nu wama nikasasakamuan anu micudad satu kawcung a caay tu pimalisa, nika caay ka pawan ci nida tu yakiwan atu nikasasetsetan tu ci Cie-mi-he-yi-kaw, sadikuday alaw mihang ku wama ci nidaan papilabu tu piyakiwan, saniked han a miedap pasipasip tu kulul. itini i piyakiwan mala sakatusa nu midakepay tu malian atu sakatusa nu pibata'an, u misaicelangay nu mibata'ay a tademwan. Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway, cabay ni Ci, mikisaba tu cacay nu mihcaan ci Cian. wawa henay ci Ing-syung baliwsan mabahel ku tupel nida mahetik i sauwac, ci kaka ni Cuo-cun miedap a miala tiya tupelan, caay ka kapah ku nipikapet malikid i balabaladan mapatay. picudadan tu kawcung cacay a mihcaan mala sakaenem nu mibataday, micudad satu tusa a mihcaan taydan i sakalima nu mibataday atu midayli ci Mu-ken tu sakacacay nu mibata'day, sayaway ka adihan ci Ta-cu aci Taw-siw nu micumuday a tademawan. . Ta-cu-wen-syung Ś§ßÁęĻśĖáťõĄ Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway a kaputan. yu mahida inai' ku piyakiwan nida a kawawan, nika icelang a minanam idaw ku nikacelakan nida tu tanayuay a nipibata'an, sisa hatidaay nu kaputan u kawanan nu midakepay tu mali atu sakacacay nu midakepay tu malian. micudaday nu miyakiway, atu ci Kun-ten, Ta-cu u malalalumaan ku nu heni, apuyu ku udip, naw u madubaay ci nida sa. sitadah ci ama nida sisa yukiwan ni Kun-ten, atu ci Ta-cu milabu i Cin-cun piyakiwan mala misetulay a tademaw, u sapipacuis tu tadahan, mipili' ci nida u nipacukulay sa alaw u mihantayay ci Kun-ten. ci Ciaw-cen u saamelikay nina miyakiway a tademaw, matineng misetul tu nikasasumadsumad nu malian, ilabuhan malakawanan nu midkepay tu malian. sayaway nu Cin-cun cacudadan nu ciawleyn, kaka ni Cun-haw, si ngisngis atu kasimiganian tu lumeniay ku wayway nida, mahida u maedesay a melawan, ala han ku migani katawaan sa kiya mata. dawmi' ku balucu', matinengay mililiday tu micudaday a saydangan. saan " itini nipicudadan tu Kaw-cung u sapatahekal tu wayway a kakitidaan, caay kaw sakaaalaw atu ciwlin sa". saan kapah ku nipimelaw tu nipiyakiwan sa, alaw han caay kaw masahicahicaay, sawsawni supa'en nu miyakiway a micudaday. . Liw-sasaydang śü≥ś†°ťē∑ Cin-cun cacudadan nu sasaydang, ci ama ni Suo-taw. yu micudad henay ci nida sawni edisan ci nida, sakasikadan sa nu cacudadan, nau sakanamuhan nida ku yakiw alaw u patay nu linges ci nida tu yakiwan. ci Pen-yi-ci-min aci Yi-kaw atu Cin-cun cacudadan masasetset tu yakiw, u Ay-haw a nikademec ku han, pacicien a mikaysang. nipalekalan nu Ay-haw-se tu nikasasetsetan a malalum, miduyi tu Ay-haw-huy patideng tu miyakiway, paayaw kina Cin-cun cacudadan tu piyakiwan a kakitidaan. kapah ku mata nu sasaydang, cinida ku makaadihay tu Ay-haw-huy atu nikasasetsetan tu Min-hean, pacebasa ku saybang tu Cin-cun cacudadan mademec kamu sa hedek satu kina nipiyakiwan nu Cin-cun cacudadan. . Kaun-ten-sen-li ŚĽ£ÁĒįŚčĚŚą© Pae-tun-cin miyakiway a cacudadan nu matinengay miwait a tademaw u mamisetulay tu sakasepat, patisuan ni Ye-ten "caay pikaka tu tineng ci Lian", nika matineng sibalucu', hina i kakadubaan atu hekal matineng idaw ku pacebaay a waywyan, hina tiyun hananay a malil mawait ku ciku nu lima ni Ci-ingan, patayda aca ci Ta-cu aci Daw-cin micumud i Cin-san-cun yakiwan mala i labuay mademec, nikudan satu i sadingsingan nu nikasasetsetan misuayaw ci Cin-cun masasetset tuci Zen-ke-kuo-cin nu tinengan, masasetset a tatusa, nikasasetset satu, pihaceng ku adada nu lima sisa ales han nida ku mamiwait tu mali a kawawan. .
S.PHON: == ńß* " maŇča a nikur~…ĺitan" ńß* == "ńß*" ¶i an-ta- ¶un kina misaŇčaaj tina nu dipun a maŇčaan. ina ka kuŇčkuan u kaw- ¶uŇč nu mijakiwaj ku sasasur~…ĺitan, itida tu i tusaaj nu tatami atu tatajnaan, nina s…ôpataj a tad…ômawan itida i sakasuŇčaaj atu nikasasumidaŇčan a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu kakuŇčkuan. "ńß*" a dajmukan nu kakuŇčkuan tu ninatatusaaj a tatamaan nu sakasiŇčaŇčanan. ¶i kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi nu ŇčaŇčan, nu dipun a sasakamu…ôn "ńßi*o" nu igu a kamuan "ńß…ô*o", i ¶in- ¶un kaw ¶uŇč pijakiwan u wanpaj miwaitaj. duma a tatamaan ńßan ¶i ¶iaw-iŇč-sun "ńßid…ôo", i min-ńß…ô-ji pijakiwan u samatin…ôŇčaj mis…ôtur~…ĺaj. nina tusaaj a mi ¶udadaj ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku nipi ¶udad i kaw ¶uŇč, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pimar~…ĺian, maŇčar~…ĺaj a mi ¶umud i ¶iaw- ¶…ô-j…ôn sisa masas…ôts…ôt sa. kus…ô ni ama nida mikur~…ĺi, kar~…ĺaapaapaan ku wajwaj, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan kina ka kuŇčkuan u masatatuŇčusaj nu tatajnaan, manamuńß ¶i pi-r~…ĺian. **:****. . j…ô-t…ôn-tun *** atu ¶i kuo- ¶in sakakapańßaj a maa…ôdaw nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺaian, i pijakiwan nu " a ¶awa" ni pi-r~…ĺi, sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ni pi-r~…ĺi kapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu misajdan ¶i nida sisa tajda i nai Ē~ °aj nu mijakiwaj a ¶a pakatawa tu katuudaj. . mu-k…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč-taj-r~…ĺaŇč ***** ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mitukudaj atu mijakiwaj tu mar~…ĺi a kaputan, ju mi ¶udad tu nu wawaan mir~…ĺabu tu paj-san-t…ôn-s…ô kaput sa atu ¶i-iŇč-siuŇč maar~…ĺaw tu sapibataan mad…ôm…ô ¶ inai Ē~ ° ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan, itini satu pikuo ¶uŇčan mir~…ĺabu tu mitukudaj mar~…ĺamitukudaj nu ńßinaar~…ĺaaj tu tinsuan, ńßinaar~…ĺaar~…ĺa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mi ¶udad satu tu kaw ¶uŇč maar~…ĺa nu pi ¶udadan nu sin-sin pijakiwan mir~…ĺińßida mir~…ĺabu, mar~…ĺa sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian atu saka ¶a ¶aj nu mibata Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mar~…ĺa sakatusa nu miwaitaj tu mar~…ĺian, u mamu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu tur~…ĺu a nipit…ôpat…ôpaan nu kapańßaj a kaputan. ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj, wawa nu ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw a sasajdan, matin…ôŇč mikur~…ĺit. naw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs nu wama nikasasakamuan anu mi ¶udad satu kaw ¶uŇč a ¶aaj tu pimar~…ĺisa, nika ¶aaj ka pawan ¶i nida tu jakiwan atu nikasas…ôts…ôtan tu ¶i ¶i…ô-mi-ńß…ô-ji-kaw, sadikudaj ar~…ĺaw mińßaŇč ku wama ¶i nidaan papir~…ĺabu tu pijakiwan, sanik…ôd ńßan a mi…ôdap pasipasip tu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ. itini i pijakiwan mar~…ĺa sakatusa nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian atu sakatusa nu pibata Ē~ °an, u misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu mibata Ē~ °aj a tad…ômwan. ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj, ¶abaj ni ¶i, mikisaba tu ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶ian. wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i iŇč-sjuŇč bar~…ĺiwsan mabańß…ôr~…ĺ ku tup…ôr~…ĺ nida mańß…ôtik i sauwa ¶, ¶i kaka ni ¶uo- ¶un mi…ôdap a miar~…ĺa tija tup…ôr~…ĺan, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku nipikap…ôt mar~…ĺikid i bar~…ĺabar~…ĺadan mapataj. pi ¶udadan tu kaw ¶uŇč ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa saka…ôn…ôm nu mibatadaj, mi ¶udad satu tusa a mińß ¶aan tajdan i sakar~…ĺima nu mibatadaj atu midajr~…ĺi ¶i mu-k…ôn tu saka ¶a ¶aj nu mibata Ē~ °daj, sajawaj ka adińßan ¶i ta- ¶u a ¶i taw-siw nu mi ¶umudaj a tad…ômawan. . ta- ¶u-w…ôn-sjuŇč **** ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj a kaputan. ju mańßida inai Ē~ ° ku pijakiwan nida a kawawan, nika i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a minanam idaw ku nika ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nida tu tanajuaj a nipibata Ē~ °an, sisa ńßatidaaj nu kaputan u kawanan nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺi atu saka ¶a ¶aj nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian. mi ¶udadaj nu mijakiwaj, atu ¶i kun-t…ôn, ta- ¶u u mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺumaan ku nu ńß…ôni, apuju ku udip, naw u madubaaj ¶i nida sa. sitadańß ¶i ama nida sisa jukiwan ni kun-t…ôn, atu ¶i ta- ¶u mir~…ĺabu i ¶in- ¶un pijakiwan mar~…ĺa mis…ôtur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw, u sapipa ¶uis tu tadańßan, mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶i nida u nipa ¶ukur~…ĺaj sa ar~…ĺaw u mińßantajaj ¶i kun-t…ôn. ¶i ¶iaw- ¶…ôn u saam…ôr~…ĺikaj nina mijakiwaj a tad…ômaw, matin…ôŇč mis…ôtur~…ĺ tu nikasasumadsumad nu mar~…ĺian, ir~…ĺabuńßan mar~…ĺakawanan nu midk…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian. sajawaj nu ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan nu ¶iawr~…ĺ…ôn, kaka ni ¶un-ńßaw, si ŇčisŇčis atu kasimiganian tu r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku wajwaj nida, mańßida u ma…ôd…ôsaj a m…ôr~…ĺawan, ar~…ĺa ńßan ku migani katawaan sa kija mata. dawmi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, matin…ôŇčaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu mi ¶udadaj a sajdaŇčan. saan " itini nipi ¶udadan tu kaw- ¶uŇč u sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu wajwaj a kakitidaan, ¶aaj kaw sakaaar~…ĺaw atu ¶iwr~…ĺin sa". saan kapańß ku nipim…ôr~…ĺaw tu nipijakiwan sa, ar~…ĺaw ńßan ¶aaj kaw masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, sawsawni supa Ē~ °…ôn nu mijakiwaj a mi ¶udadaj. . r~…ĺiw-sasajdaŇč *** ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan nu sasajdaŇč, ¶i ama ni suo-taw. ju mi ¶udad ńß…ônaj ¶i nida sawni …ôdisan ¶i nida, sakasikadan sa nu ¶a ¶udadan, nau sakanamuńßan nida ku jakiw ar~…ĺaw u pataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i nida tu jakiwan. ¶i p…ôn-ji- ¶i-min a ¶i ji-kaw atu ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan masas…ôts…ôt tu jakiw, u aj-ńßaw a nikad…ôm…ô ¶ ku ńßan, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn a mikajsaŇč. nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu aj-ńßaw-s…ô tu nikasas…ôts…ôtan a mar~…ĺar~…ĺum, miduji tu aj-ńßaw-ńßuj patid…ôŇč tu mijakiwaj, paajaw kina ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan tu pijakiwan a kakitidaan. kapańß ku mata nu sasajdaŇč, ¶inida ku makaadińßaj tu aj-ńßaw-ńßuj atu nikasas…ôts…ôtan tu min-ńß…ôan, pa ¶…ôbasa ku sajbaŇč tu ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan mad…ôm…ô ¶ kamu sa ńß…ôd…ôk satu kina nipijakiwan nu ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan. . kaun-t…ôn-s…ôn-r~…ĺi **** pa…ô-tun- ¶in mijakiwaj a ¶a ¶udadan nu matin…ôŇčaj miwait a tad…ômaw u mamis…ôtur~…ĺaj tu sakas…ôpat, patisuan ni j…ô-t…ôn " ¶aaj pikaka tu tin…ôŇč ¶i r~…ĺian", nika matin…ôŇč sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ńßina i kakadubaan atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ matin…ôŇč idaw ku pa ¶…ôbaaj a wajwjan, ńßina tijun ńßananaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺ mawait ku ¶iku nu r~…ĺima ni ¶i-iŇčan, patajda a ¶a ¶i ta- ¶u a ¶i daw- ¶in mi ¶umud i ¶in-san- ¶un jakiwan mar~…ĺa i r~…ĺabuaj mad…ôm…ô ¶, nikudan satu i sadiŇčsiŇčan nu nikasas…ôts…ôtan misuajaw ¶i ¶in- ¶un masas…ôts…ôt tu ¶i z…ôn-k…ô-kuo- ¶in nu tin…ôŇčan, masas…ôts…ôt a tatusa, nikasas…ôts…ôt satu, pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku adada nu r~…ĺima sisa ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan nida ku mamiwait tu mar~…ĺi a kawawan. .
S.FORM: == H2 " manga a nikulitan" H2 == "H2" ci An-ta-cun kina misangaay tina nu Dipun a mangaan. ina ka kungkuan u Kaw-cung nu miyakiway ku sasasulitan, itida tu i tusaay nu tatami atu tataynaan, nina sepatay a tademawan itida i sakasungaay atu nikasasumidangan a nikatahekalan nu kakungkuan. "H2" a daymukan nu kakungkuan tu ninatatusaay a tatamaan nu sakasinganganan. ci Kuo-cin-pi-li nu ngangan, nu Dipun a sasakamuen "HIRO" nu igu a kamuan "HERO", i Cin-cun kawcung piyakiwan u wanpay miwaitay. duma a tatamaan han ci Ciaw-ing-sun "HIDEO", i Min-he-yi piyakiwan u samatinengay misetulay. nina tusaay a micudaday caay kaw malecaday ku nipicudad i kawcung, caay kalecad ku pimalian, mangalay a micumud i Ciaw-ce-yen sisa masasetset sa. "H2" ."H2" "HIRO"śėĮŚŹĖŤčĪŤ™ě"HERO"ÁöĄŤęßťü≥, (HIDEO), . ina tatusaay a cabayan sa caay kalecad ku nipikawcungan, nu nikapicudadan ni Kuo-cin-pi-li tu kawcung patelac ku nipimelaw nu misaydan tu imelang nida, sisa ci Kuo-cin-pi-li acaay tu kaku piyakiw sa, sisa mipili' ci nida tu nayi'ay nu miyakiway a cacudadan nu kawcung, nikatinengan satu tu nikapatelac nu misaydan, itida satu patideng tu manamuhay nu micudaday a tademaw tu piyakiwan nu masakaputay, malasakakaay nu miwaitay tu malian. sisa " H2" inaimi han " tusaay ingsyung" . musakamu tu i yayakiwan nu nikasasetsetan, i hekal han u masasungaayay ku nu heni a tatusa. ina ka kungkuan nu hedek u sakapahay a melawan itini i Ciaw-ce-yen a nikasasetsetan nu malian. .śČÄšĽ•"H2" . Kuo-cin-pi-li ŚúčŤ¶čśĮĒŚĎā Pilecuhan: cacay bulad sabaw enem demiad. Cin-cun cacudadan nu piyakiwan wanpay miwaitay, naw Cin-na cungsye nu wanpay miwaitay, nipatelacan nu misaydang, sisa pili' satu ci nida tu inai'ay nu yakiwan a picudadan. likeluh saca tu ci Ku-he-cun-haw atu misaydang tu mapaadih satu, atu ci Ye-ten-dun paytem sa patideng tu Cin-cun cacudadan tu piyakiwan nu likisian, sakatulu ku pibataan nida, sakapahay nida a mibata', idaw ku "hidawhaw anta cewan" nu pinganganan. ci Pi-ci insiyung ku matinengay ci Yi-kun-ya-lin, misuayaw ci Yi-kun-ya-li acu Ku-he-cun-haw idaw ku ngalay, misuayaw tina tusaay a ngalay nai' ku watan. ÁĒüśó•:1śúą16śó•. . Ci-in-siung ś©ėŤčĪťõĄ pailecuhan: sabaw cacay bulad enem demiad. matinengay nu misetulay tu yakiaw a tademaw ci Min-he-yi-kaw, hina i balucu'en nida ku ci lian tu caycin anta tu nikakapahan. micudad henay i Cin-na-cun-sye sikayan ni Kuo-cin-pi-li tu ci Yi-kun-ya-lin. luma' ni Ci-in-siung u tataydaan nina sapatay a tademaw ci Pi-li,Ten-ye, Ya-lin kalecapuan, u aadihan ni Pi,Ya-ten tu cudadan. ÁĒüśó•:11śúą6śó•. . Ye-kun-ya-lin ťõ®ŚģģťõÖÁé≤ pilecuhan: walu bulad sabaw enem demiad. sakapahay nu biyawan a cabayan ci Pi-li, nika kaadihan ni Pi-li ku nisacabayan, sipasiwkay han ci Ci-ing-siung, malamamidang tu ni In-syung, nika ida i balucu ku ngalay ci Pi-lian idaw henay ku ngalay ci Pi-lian. 41 pilecuhan: tulu bulad tulu demiad. sakapahay ni Pi-li micudad i kawcung, manamuh ci Pi-lian. kakahan u Cin-cun cacudadan nu miyakiway a ciawlien. ci Pi-li itida i kuse ni ama nida mikuli, kalaapaapaan ku wayway, kilul han kina ka kungkuan u masatatungusay nu tataynaan, manamuh ci Pi-lian. ÁĒüśó•:3śúą3śó•. . Ye-ten-tun ťáéÁĒįśē¶ atu ci Kuo-cin sakakapahay a maaedaw nu midakepay tu malaian, i piyakiwan nu " acawa" ni Pi-li, sakalecad ni Pi-li kapatelacan nu misaydan ci nida sisa tayda i nai'ay nu miyakiway a cacudadan i Cin-cun-kaw-siaw. ci Ciaw-cen caay kaw kalawkaway nika kahemekan ku icelang, piyakiwan u sakasepat nu mibataay, caay ka lawlaw ku balucu, nika i katuuday matineng pakatawa tu katuuday. . Mu-ken-lung-tay-lang śú®ś†ĻťĺćŚ§™ťÉé Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu mitukuday atu miyakiway tu mali a kaputan, yu micudad tu nu wawaan milabu tu Pay-san-ten-se kaput sa atu Ci-ing-siung maalaw tu sapibataan mademec inai' ku nabalucuan, itini satu pikuocungan milabu tu mitukuday malamitukuday nu hinaalaay tu tinsuan, hinaalaala ku balucu'. micudad satu tu kawcung maala nu picudadan nu Sin-sin piyakiwan milihida milabu, mala sakay hekal nu midakepay tu malian atu sakacacay nu mibata'ay, malecad mala sakatusa nu miwaitay tu malian, u mamuculil tu tulu a nipitepatepaan nu kapahay a kaputan. Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway, wawa nu Cin-cun-kaw-siaw a sasaydan, matineng mikulit. naw mapatay nu linges nu wama nikasasakamuan anu micudad satu kawcung a caay tu pimalisa, nika caay ka pawan ci nida tu yakiwan atu nikasasetsetan tu ci Cie-mi-he-yi-kaw, sadikuday alaw mihang ku wama ci nidaan papilabu tu piyakiwan, saniked han a miedap pasipasip tu kulul. itini i piyakiwan mala sakatusa nu midakepay tu malian atu sakatusa nu pibata'an, u misaicelangay nu mibata'ay a tademwan. Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway, cabay ni Ci, mikisaba tu cacay nu mihcaan ci Cian. wawa henay ci Ing-syung baliwsan mabahel ku tupel nida mahetik i sauwac, ci kaka ni Cuo-cun miedap a miala tiya tupelan, caay ka kapah ku nipikapet malikid i balabaladan mapatay. picudadan tu kawcung cacay a mihcaan mala sakaenem nu mibataday, micudad satu tusa a mihcaan taydan i sakalima nu mibataday atu midayli ci Mu-ken tu sakacacay nu mibata'day, sayaway ka adihan ci Ta-cu aci Taw-siw nu micumuday a tademawan. . Ta-cu-wen-syung Ś§ßÁęĻśĖáťõĄ Cin-cun-kaw-siaw nu miyakiway a kaputan. yu mahida inai' ku piyakiwan nida a kawawan, nika icelang a minanam idaw ku nikacelakan nida tu tanayuay a nipibata'an, sisa hatidaay nu kaputan u kawanan nu midakepay tu mali atu sakacacay nu midakepay tu malian. micudaday nu miyakiway, atu ci Kun-ten, Ta-cu u malalalumaan ku nu heni, apuyu ku udip, naw u madubaay ci nida sa. sitadah ci ama nida sisa yukiwan ni Kun-ten, atu ci Ta-cu milabu i Cin-cun piyakiwan mala misetulay a tademaw, u sapipacuis tu tadahan, mipili' ci nida u nipacukulay sa alaw u mihantayay ci Kun-ten. ci Ciaw-cen u saamelikay nina miyakiway a tademaw, matineng misetul tu nikasasumadsumad nu malian, ilabuhan malakawanan nu midkepay tu malian. sayaway nu Cin-cun cacudadan nu ciawleyn, kaka ni Cun-haw, si ngisngis atu kasimiganian tu lumeniay ku wayway nida, mahida u maedesay a melawan, ala han ku migani katawaan sa kiya mata. dawmi' ku balucu', matinengay mililiday tu micudaday a saydangan. saan " itini nipicudadan tu Kaw-cung u sapatahekal tu wayway a kakitidaan, caay kaw sakaaalaw atu ciwlin sa". saan kapah ku nipimelaw tu nipiyakiwan sa, alaw han caay kaw masahicahicaay, sawsawni supa'en nu miyakiway a micudaday. . Liw-sasaydang śü≥ś†°ťē∑ Cin-cun cacudadan nu sasaydang, ci ama ni Suo-taw. yu micudad henay ci nida sawni edisan ci nida, sakasikadan sa nu cacudadan, nau sakanamuhan nida ku yakiw alaw u patay nu linges ci nida tu yakiwan. ci Pen-yi-ci-min aci Yi-kaw atu Cin-cun cacudadan masasetset tu yakiw, u Ay-haw a nikademec ku han, pacicien a mikaysang. nipalekalan nu Ay-haw-se tu nikasasetsetan a malalum, miduyi tu Ay-haw-huy patideng tu miyakiway, paayaw kina Cin-cun cacudadan tu piyakiwan a kakitidaan. kapah ku mata nu sasaydang, cinida ku makaadihay tu Ay-haw-huy atu nikasasetsetan tu Min-hean, pacebasa ku saybang tu Cin-cun cacudadan mademec kamu sa hedek satu kina nipiyakiwan nu Cin-cun cacudadan. . Kaun-ten-sen-li ŚĽ£ÁĒįŚčĚŚą© Pae-tun-cin miyakiway a cacudadan nu matinengay miwait a tademaw u mamisetulay tu sakasepat, patisuan ni Ye-ten "caay pikaka tu tineng ci Lian", nika matineng sibalucu', hina i kakadubaan atu hekal matineng idaw ku pacebaay a waywyan, hina tiyun hananay a malil mawait ku ciku nu lima ni Ci-ingan, patayda aca ci Ta-cu aci Daw-cin micumud i Cin-san-cun yakiwan mala i labuay mademec, nikudan satu i sadingsingan nu nikasasetsetan misuayaw ci Cin-cun masasetset tuci Zen-ke-kuo-cin nu tinengan, masasetset a tatusa, nikasasetset satu, pihaceng ku adada nu lima sisa ales han nida ku mamiwait tu mali a kawawan. .
S.PHON: == ńß* " maŇča a nikur~…ĺitan" ńß* == "ńß*" ¶i an-ta- ¶un kina misaŇčaaj tina nu dipun a maŇčaan. ina ka kuŇčkuan u kaw- ¶uŇč nu mijakiwaj ku sasasur~…ĺitan, itida tu i tusaaj nu tatami atu tatajnaan, nina s…ôpataj a tad…ômawan itida i sakasuŇčaaj atu nikasasumidaŇčan a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu kakuŇčkuan. "ńß*" a dajmukan nu kakuŇčkuan tu ninatatusaaj a tatamaan nu sakasiŇčaŇčanan. ¶i kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi nu ŇčaŇčan, nu dipun a sasakamu…ôn "ńßi*o" nu igu a kamuan "ńß…ô*o", i ¶in- ¶un kaw ¶uŇč pijakiwan u wanpaj miwaitaj. duma a tatamaan ńßan ¶i ¶iaw-iŇč-sun "ńßid…ôo", i min-ńß…ô-ji pijakiwan u samatin…ôŇčaj mis…ôtur~…ĺaj. nina tusaaj a mi ¶udadaj ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku nipi ¶udad i kaw ¶uŇč, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pimar~…ĺian, maŇčar~…ĺaj a mi ¶umud i ¶iaw- ¶…ô-j…ôn sisa masas…ôts…ôt sa. "ńß*" ."ńß*" "ńßi*o"****"ńß…ô*o"***, (ńßid…ôo), . ina tatusaaj a ¶abajan sa ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nipikaw ¶uŇčan, nu nikapi ¶udadan ni kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi tu kaw ¶uŇč pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku nipim…ôr~…ĺaw nu misajdan tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida, sisa ¶i kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi a ¶aaj tu kaku pijakiw sa, sisa mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶i nida tu naji Ē~ °aj nu mijakiwaj a ¶a ¶udadan nu kaw ¶uŇč, nikatin…ôŇčan satu tu iŇčsjuŇč" . musakamu tu i jajakiwan nu nikasas…ôts…ôtan, i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßan u masasuŇčaajaj ku nu ńß…ôni a tatusa. ina ka kuŇčkuan nu ńß…ôd…ôk u sakapańßaj a m…ôr~…ĺawan itini i ¶iaw- ¶…ô-j…ôn a nikasas…ôts…ôtan nu mar~…ĺian. .**"ńß*" . kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi **** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad sabaw …ôn…ôm d…ômiad. ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan nu pijakiwan wanpaj miwaitaj, naw ¶in-na ¶uŇčsj…ô nu wanpaj miwaitaj, nipat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu misajdaŇč, sisa pir~…ĺi Ē~ ° satu ¶i nida tu inai Ē~ °aj nu jakiwan a pi ¶udadan. r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß sa ¶a tu ¶i ku-ńß…ô- ¶un-ńßaw atu misajdaŇč tu mapaadińß satu, atu ¶i j…ô-t…ôn-dun pajt…ôm sa patid…ôŇč tu ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan tu pijakiwan nu r~…ĺikisian, sakatur~…ĺu ku pibataan nida, sakapańßaj nida a mibata Ē~ °, idaw ku "ńßidawńßaw anta ¶…ôwan" nu piŇčaŇčanan. ¶i pi- ¶i insijuŇč ku matin…ôŇčaj ¶i ji-kun-ja-r~…ĺin, misuajaw ¶i ji-kun-ja-r~…ĺi a ¶u ku-ńß…ô- ¶un-ńßaw idaw ku Ňčar~…ĺaj, misuajaw tina tusaaj a Ňčar~…ĺaj nai Ē~ ° ku watan. **:*****. . ¶i-in-siuŇč *** pair~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: sabaw ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm d…ômiad. matin…ôŇčaj nu mis…ôtur~…ĺaj tu jakiaw a tad…ômaw ¶i min-ńß…ô-ji-kaw, ńßina i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn nida ku ¶i r~…ĺian tu ¶aj ¶in anta tu nikakapańßan. mi ¶udad ńß…ônaj i ¶in-na- ¶un-sj…ô sikajan ni kuo- ¶in-pi-r~…ĺi tu ¶i ji-kun-ja-r~…ĺin. r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ¶i-in-siuŇč u tatajdaan nina sapataj a tad…ômaw ¶i pi-r~…ĺi,t…ôn-j…ô, ja-r~…ĺin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan, u aadińßan ni pi,ja-t…ôn tu ¶udadan. **:*****. . j…ô-kun-ja-r~…ĺin **** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: war~…ĺu bur~…ĺad sabaw …ôn…ôm d…ômiad. sakapańßaj nu bijawan a ¶abajan ¶i pi-r~…ĺi, nika kaadińßan ni pi-r~…ĺi ku nisa ¶abajan, sipasiwkaj ńßan ¶i ¶i-iŇč-siuŇč, mar~…ĺamamidaŇč tu ni in-sjuŇč, nika ida i bar~…ĺu ¶u ku Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶i pi-r~…ĺian idaw ńß…ônaj ku Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶i pi-r~…ĺian. ** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: tur~…ĺu bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad. sakapańßaj ni pi-r~…ĺi mi ¶udad i kaw ¶uŇč, manamuńß ¶i pi-r~…ĺian. kakańßan u ¶in- ¶un ¶a ¶udadan nu mijakiwaj a ¶iawr~…ĺi…ôn. ¶i pi-r~…ĺi itida i kus…ô ni ama nida mikur~…ĺi, kar~…ĺaapaapaan ku wajwaj, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan kina ka kuŇčkuan u masatatuŇčusaj nu tatajnaan, manamuńß ¶i pi-r~…ĺian. **:****. . j…ô-t…ôn-tun *** atu ¶i kuo- ¶in sakakapańßaj a maa…ôdaw nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺaian, i pijakiwan nu " a ¶awa" ni pi-r~…ĺi, sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ni pi-r~…ĺi kapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu misajdan ¶i nida sisa tajda i nai Ē~ °aj nu mijakiwaj a ¶a ¶udadan i ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw. ¶i ¶iaw- ¶…ôn ¶aaj kaw kar~…ĺawkawaj nika kańß…ôm…ôkan ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, pijakiwan u sakas…ôpat nu mibataaj, ¶aaj ka r~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u, nika i katuudaj matin…ôŇč pakatawa tu katuudaj. . mu-k…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč-taj-r~…ĺaŇč ***** ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mitukudaj atu mijakiwaj tu mar~…ĺi a kaputan, ju mi ¶udad tu nu wawaan mir~…ĺabu tu paj-san-t…ôn-s…ô kaput sa atu ¶i-iŇč-siuŇč maar~…ĺaw tu sapibataan mad…ôm…ô ¶ inai Ē~ ° ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan, itini satu pikuo ¶uŇčan mir~…ĺabu tu mitukudaj mar~…ĺamitukudaj nu ńßinaar~…ĺaaj tu tinsuan, ńßinaar~…ĺaar~…ĺa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mi ¶udad satu tu kaw ¶uŇč maar~…ĺa nu pi ¶udadan nu sin-sin pijakiwan mir~…ĺińßida mir~…ĺabu, mar~…ĺa sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian atu saka ¶a ¶aj nu mibata Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mar~…ĺa sakatusa nu miwaitaj tu mar~…ĺian, u mamu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu tur~…ĺu a nipit…ôpat…ôpaan nu kapańßaj a kaputan. ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj, wawa nu ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw a sasajdan, matin…ôŇč mikur~…ĺit. naw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs nu wama nikasasakamuan anu mi ¶udad satu kaw ¶uŇč a ¶aaj tu pimar~…ĺisa, nika ¶aaj ka pawan ¶i nida tu jakiwan atu nikasas…ôts…ôtan tu ¶i ¶i…ô-mi-ńß…ô-ji-kaw, sadikudaj ar~…ĺaw mińßaŇč ku wama ¶i nidaan papir~…ĺabu tu pijakiwan, sanik…ôd ńßan a mi…ôdap pasipasip tu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ. itini i pijakiwan mar~…ĺa sakatusa nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian atu sakatusa nu pibata Ē~ °an, u misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu mibata Ē~ °aj a tad…ômwan. ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj, ¶abaj ni ¶i, mikisaba tu ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶ian. wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i iŇč-sjuŇč bar~…ĺiwsan mabańß…ôr~…ĺ ku tup…ôr~…ĺ nida mańß…ôtik i sauwa ¶, ¶i kaka ni ¶uo- ¶un mi…ôdap a miar~…ĺa tija tup…ôr~…ĺan, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku nipikap…ôt mar~…ĺikid i bar~…ĺabar~…ĺadan mapataj. pi ¶udadan tu kaw ¶uŇč ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa saka…ôn…ôm nu mibatadaj, mi ¶udad satu tusa a mińß ¶aan tajdan i sakar~…ĺima nu mibatadaj atu midajr~…ĺi ¶i mu-k…ôn tu saka ¶a ¶aj nu mibata Ē~ °daj, sajawaj ka adińßan ¶i ta- ¶u a ¶i taw-siw nu mi ¶umudaj a tad…ômawan. . ta- ¶u-w…ôn-sjuŇč **** ¶in- ¶un-kaw-siaw nu mijakiwaj a kaputan. ju mańßida inai Ē~ ° ku pijakiwan nida a kawawan, nika i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a minanam idaw ku nika ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nida tu tanajuaj a nipibata Ē~ °an, sisa ńßatidaaj nu kaputan u kawanan nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺi atu saka ¶a ¶aj nu midak…ôpaj tu mar~…ĺian. mi ¶udadaj nu mijakiwaj, atu ¶i kun-t…ôn, ta- ¶u u mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺumaan ku nu ńß…ôni, apuju ku udip, naw u madubaaj ¶i nida sa. sitadańß ¶i ama nida sisa jukiwan ni kun-t…ôn, atu ¶i ta- ¶u mir~…ĺabu i ¶in- ¶un pijakiwan mar~…ĺa mis…ôtur~…ĺaj
